city.evidence: Customer: Location Delhi hai. ... South Delhi.

occupation.evidence: Customer: Nahi, job hai, job hai.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Main ping kar lunga aapko. ... Theek hai.

objections.quote: Nahi, nahi, nahi. Main main karta hoon. Ye koi website hai kya?
Nahi, abhi nahi, abhi nahi, nahi. Kyunki main na just pahuncha hoon office, sir.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Main kar lunga aapko. ... Main ping kar dunga, message kar dunga aapko kab call karna hai.

agent_promises: 1 crore term insurance cover from day one
60 lakh coverage for 66,126 INR annual premium for 10 years

product_fit.product_pitched: Term plus mutual fund combined plan
product_fit.mismatch_reason: The quoted premium (66k) is over 10% of the customer's annual income (6L), making it a poor financial fit.
missed_opportunities: Did not ask about existing insurance or investment goals.

approachability.reasoning: Customer requested details and a website to verify, indicating interest but caution regarding the product and premium.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced a new Tata AIA term-plus-mutual-fund plan and immediately asked for the customer's age.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was initially passive but became cautious and defensive when the premium was quoted, requesting verification.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer rejected the immediate premium quote and asked for a website to verify the product details.
call_narrative.ending: Agent agreed to send details via WhatsApp and the customer promised to ping back when ready.

key_quotes: Ye koi website hai kya? Website bataiye main us pe check karunga uske baad baat karunga aapse.
Nahi, abhi nahi, abhi nahi, nahi. Kyunki main na just pahuncha hoon office, sir.
red_flags: Agent misrepresented the product by implying it has no tax implications and comparing it to mutual fund returns without proper risk disclosure.
Agent ignored the customer's income level by quoting a high premium relative to their annual salary.
